programme.title: What Will I Be Today?
programme.desc: Join your new friends Kauri, Esera and Wing Gai as they go on imaginative adventures to solve every day problems.

programme.title: Bird's Eye View
programme.desc: The birds decide to get away from the noise of the city. Unfortunately, the Humans have the same idea. What are they doing now?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug & Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien look like regular teenagers, usually. But together they are Ladybug and Cat Noir, the heroes that protect Paris from the evil Hawk Moth!

programme.title: Megamind Rules!
programme.desc: Megamind is back, but he's turning over a new leaf. Instead of terrorising Metro City, Megamind is going good: ditching his evil ways to protect the city as the world's first superhero influencer.

programme.title: Mr Hugo's Little Library
programme.desc: A sheepish sheep gets a little help from her friends while an ambitious superhero learns a little can go a long way.

programme.title: What Now?
programme.desc: Come and join the party! Catch Aashma, Imy, Manu and Rahil for gunge, cream pies, challenges, prizes and adventures across Aotearoa! Haere mai ki te whare o te hūwareware!

programme.title: Tipua
programme.desc: Determined to understand the whakapapa of the mysterious taonga Ārepa does some research and discovers the tohunga in her dreams is somehow linked to the hei tiki.

programme.title: The Voice U.S.A
programme.desc: Coaches Michael Bublé, Niall Horan, Reba McEntire and Snoop Dogg all vie to discover and coach the next singing phenomenon on the sixth and final night of blind auditions.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Tane faces the music. Brax dreams of a better life. David fights for Lacey’s freedom.

programme.title: Home Economics
programme.desc: When the Hayworths can’t agree where to trick-or-treat, they find themselves in their own horror stories.

programme.title: Cats & Dogs 2: The Revenge Of Kitty Galore
programme.desc: When Kitty Galore, a rogue spy, devises a plan to destroy all human and canine life, the dogs and cats have to put their ongoing battle on hold to stop her from executing her evil plot..

programme.title: Netball: ANZ Premiership
programme.desc: Live coverage of the final match in Round 2 in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Tactix host the Pulse from Wolfbrook Arean in Christchurch.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon is forced to take a vacation by the university, he goes to work with Amy in her neurobiology lab. Meanwhile, Bernadette wants Howard to sign a pre-nuptial agreement.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A mechanic leads his friend astray and there are four GOATs in a vehicle, and one in the boot. Tough consequences for a driver with drugs in his system, and he’s never held a licence.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Joanna Page unwisely attempts gymnastics and Kumail Nanjiani moves skittles with oven gloves.

programme.title: Movie: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: Jason Bourne, a former CIA agent, is drawn out of hiding by CIA director Robert Dewey. He then sets out to discover more about his past, family and his father's death. Starring Matt Damon..

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: A popular weight loss medication reveals the cracks in a couple's relationship. Two sisters face an unexpected diagnosis.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Harper and Miles feel the weight of their recent mistakes, while Harper is tasked with training Miles; Nolan and Celina are dispatched to a robbery call where Nolan encounters a familiar face.

programme.title: Firebite
programme.desc: Series Premiere: When vampires kidnap an Aboriginal man, renegade vampire hunters Tyson and Shanika fight back.

programme.title: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: In this shocking exposé, real-life cults are unravelled from the leaders down to the individual members, to help explain their extreme beliefs and what led them to committing homicide.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Officers Hodges and Bidderman deal with a driver who tries to pull the wool over their eyes claiming that a glasses case looks the same as a cellphone.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: TVNZ2 Returns At 6am
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Les Mills Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri And Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou are invited to lunch with two very slow snails, Hemi and Lemi. Kiri is famished but she tries to be polite and not gnash her teeth.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Featuring Anika Moa and her music, educating and entertaining kids through play, movement and dance.

programme.title: The Jungle Bunch To The Rescue!
programme.sub-title: Once Upon A Time In The Jungle
programme.desc: The jungle can be a dangerous place... but thankfully there are a group of heroes ready to defend those in trouble. Join the Jungle Bunch as they rush to the rescue of their animal friends!

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.sub-title: The Art Of The Silent Fist
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Gus the Itsy Bitsy Knight
programme.desc: Astride his electric pony, wielding a laser sword, little Gus is out to prove that a brave heart can overcome anything.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: John grows suspicious. Brax’s grand plan stalls. Great news is afoot for Sonny.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Our bonza, ripper, fair dinkum Aussie Travel Guides take a 10-day South Pacific cruise; swimming with turtles in New Caledonia and snorkelling in Vanuatu.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is upset when Bart becomes a better jazz musician than her, so she decides to set up an animal shelter in the Simpsons' attic.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A change in Sheldon's routine forces him to re-evaluate his entire life when his barber is sick. Meanwhile, Howard rethinks his decision to go into space after astronaut training.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Lacey fights off the press. John plays detective. Sonny and Dana celebrate progress.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cody's triggered.

programme.title: Fear Factor: House Of Fear
programme.desc: In the shocking semi-finals, alliances are tested and strategies shift after Johnny reveals a first-ever double elimination; a painful electrocution challenge puts four players at risk.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Nolan, Harper and Miles face a dangerous situation when a routine check takes a sudden turn; Bailey conducts a covert investigation at the Pentagon at the request of Lt. Grey.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Bex Henderson must fight to have the Hunting Party team reinstated so that they can catch the infamous "Boogeyman" killer, Ron Simms, who is currently at large.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A major shootout at a gun store may be connected to the death of a young woman involved in a suicide pact.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programme.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programme.title: Wentworth
programme.desc: With Rita’s return imminent, Lou pressures the H1 family to declare allegiance to her. Rita enacts a plan to force information from Lou, only for the plan to backfire. Ann continues to unravel.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Deborah is invited to hang with some of her favourite comedians.

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: The farmers and their partners gather for their first get-together at the country ball. After a shuffle on the dance floor, the farmers choose who to take on the next solo date.

programme.title: TVNZ2 Returns At 5am
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programme.title: Les Mills Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri And Lou
programme.desc: Lou’s drumming makes Kiri feel funny and wobbly all over. Pania explains that there’s nothing wrong - it’s called dancing.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Featuring Anika Moa and her music, educating and entertaining kids through play, movement and dance.
